title: rootless podman 1.9.1: cannot open: /proc/17321/ns/user
body:
I didn't want to continue the closed and solved issue (https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5306) but just document my workaround for podman 1.9.1.

I can start using podman again after I run `podman system migrate` (no reboot required) until I remove my created containers. Then I'm back to the above error message.

_See also posted by @tunip in https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5306#issuecomment-591661572_
